articles.title: Bitcoin tumbles below $79,000 as rising bond yields, inflation worries rattle markets
articles.description: Stocks, gold and crypto slide while crude oil tops $100 and traders rapidly reprice Fed expectations for rate hikes.

articles.title: Kraken parent Payward cuts 150 staff, streamlining business ahead of planned IPO
articles.description: The crypto exchange is also seeking fresh funding at a $20 billion valuation as it ramps up acquisitions and prepares for a public listing.

articles.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers. Now it wants to beat Google at AI.
articles.description: AI video generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

articles.title: Polish lawmakers back revised crypto bill after repeated vetoes
articles.description: Polish lawmakers approve a Ministry of Finance-backed crypto bill to implement the EU MiCA framework in a 241–200 vote after repeated vetoes.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: BNB is only gainer as index drops 2%
articles.description: BNB (BNB) rose 0.4% while Bitcoin (BTC) fell 1.3% from Thursday.

articles.title: XRP gives back gains after Senate crypto bill sparks 5% rally
articles.description: XRP stayed pinned below resistance even as derivatives activity surged ahead of a key Senate vote that could formally reinforce the token’s commodity status.

articles.title: Meridian Ventures launched $35M fund to back MBA-deferred founders
articles.description: Meridian Ventures, the venture firm founded by Devon Gethers and Karlton Haney, announced on Friday the raise of a $35 million second fund to back pre-seed and seed-stage companies founded by those who have deferred MBAs.

articles.title: Bitcoin stalls above $80K despite CLARITY Act pass: What will trigger a breakout?
articles.description: Bitcoin’s break above $82,000 and a return of strong institutional demand are prerequisites to confirm a trend change for BTC price.

articles.title: Strategy to repurchase $1.5 billion of 2029 convertible bonds using cash or bitcoin sales
articles.description: Led by Michael Saylor, the company aims to retire half of its outstanding 0% 2029 converts as it restructures liabilities tied to its bitcoin treasury strategy.

articles.title: South Korea plans July rules for tokenized securities
articles.description: South Korea's FSC is preparing detailed rules for tokenized securities before a legal framework for blockchain-based securities takes effect in February 2027.

articles.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
articles.description: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.

articles.title: 解決長程打擊「燃料焦慮」，以色列斥資千萬美元為 F-35I 開發專屬外掛油箱
articles.description: 經過近兩年與伊朗的密集交戰，以色列空軍為解決戰機頻繁出動的「燃料焦慮」，國防部近日證實，將投入超過 3,400 […]

articles.title: Winklevoss’ Gemini jumps 25% on $100 million bitcoin infusion despite deepening losses
articles.description: Gemini's revenue improved 42% year-over-year to $50.3 million, helping narrow its net loss by 27% from $149.3 million a year earlier.

articles.title: OKX, Korea Investment and Securities said to be in talks for 40% of Coinone
articles.description: OKX's planned move into the South Korean market would echo that of Binance, which completed its acquisition of Seoul-based Gopax last year.

articles.title: Bitcoin risks ‘next downtrend’ as traders diverge on fate of $82K resistance
articles.description: Bitcoin traders split between a "massive catch-up" with stocks and the start of its "next downtrend" as BTC price action failed to flip $82,000 to support.

articles.title: THORChain pauses trading after suspected $10M exploit
articles.description: THORChain paused trading after ZachXBT flagged a suspected $10 million exploit spanning Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Chain and Base.

articles.title: Crypto’s regulatory tailwind runs into a potential rates reset
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for May 15, 2026

articles.title: Wall Street is starting to notice one of crypto’s smartest AI bets
articles.description: A growing spotlight on Nof1’s Alpha Arena suggests SUI Group and Karatage may have gotten early to one of the most important experiments in finance: teaching AI how to trade in real markets.

articles.title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
articles.description: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.

articles.title: Why is Hyperliquid's HYPE token price up 23% in one day?
articles.description: Fresh US ETF launches and Coinbase’s Hyperliquid deal helped fuel HYPE’s rally this week, but technicals warn of a possible pullback.
